title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for predicting real-world events by suing the CFTC and persisting through four years of regulatory opposition. The company achieved a $22 billion valuation after breaking through regulatory barriers, demonstrating rapid scaling from market legitimacy.
